purpose: The rule-text delta_t boundary arms at the constructor, pinned through the parse fingerprint's delta field: no leading digits and an explicit '<-0' both store 0; 65535 (uint16 max) stores verbatim; 65536 WRAPS to 0 and 70000 to 4464 — the numba.types.uint16 cast at rule_parser.py:243, so a delta at or past 2**16 silently changes the rule's firing schedule instead of raising.
provenance: docs/surface.md dsl:rule-text happy-delta-t/bound-zero-delta-default/bound-delta-t-uint16 widening; rule_parser.py:51-64, :243 at the pin; wrap values screened live 2026-07-12 (4 fresh pin processes, digest-stable)
